4: Wise ... house of mourning Serious thought is better than what we call entertainment
5: It Is Important To Be Thoughtful. If A Man Is Not Careful There Are Things That Can Make Him Behave Foolishly (7.5-10).
6: Crackling This word sounds like the sound it describes. Light fuel of dry twigs and leaves would sound like this but would not burn for long.
8: Thing Here "word." We need to speak and write keeping in mind the effect they are likely to have. This requires patience and humility
14: one over against the other, to the end that man should find nothing after him.
19: Ten is regularly used to mean ‘a number of’ (Peter Pett)
26: hands [as] bands: whoso pleaseth God shall escape from her; but the sinner shall be taken by her.
28: But a woman ... I have found not Solomon seems to have what we would call a sexist viewpoint, but we need to remember where he was looking. He had fallen into adultery with many wives, and concubines. Many of them were from pagan nations. We need to remember his picture of the virtuous woman beginning in pr 31:10.
29: Advice With Regard To Serving The King. The Problem of the Death of the Wicked.
Advice With Regard to a Wise Man’s Responsibility in Serving the King (8.1-9).
